title: Rotom Phone Retexture
description: Retextures for Mur1lu's Rotom Phone mod
body:
This resource pack edits the textures of the [Rotom Phone Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rotom-phone-cobblemon) by MUR1LU, attempting to make them look closer to the visual style of Minecraft and Cobblemon as a whole.

Obviously, the mod is required for this resource pack to do anything, as well as all of its dependencies.
